untranslatable_reason: This is an entry signal (seasonal pattern timing with calendar-based entry rules and scale-in conditions), not a position sizing rule. It describes WHEN and HOW to enter (first entry on day 1, scale on dips), but contains no sizing methodology (no risk %, no Kelly, no volatility scaling, no drawdown reduction, no anti-martingale). Position sizing rules specify HOW MUCH to risk per trade; this rule specifies WHEN to trade and entry mechanics.
